examples: Topics include oral epic performance, sacred narrative, Koranic chant performance, the folktale, solo performance, cultural production and resistance.
Children study the national curriculum in the morning and receive a Koranic education in the afternoon.
Even here where restoration is futile, Uzbeks are busy righting minarets and retouching Koranic script.
The Chechens became famous for their warrior prowess, the Dagestanis for their Koranic learning.
